description: initialize a new Arbor AO run — create the hypothesis tree (root n0) + run config under .arbor/
rules: establishes the task tuple (M_0, O, E_dev, E_test) and budget/branching/depth
always (re)creates the run with --force so init is idempotent in the store
usage: Set OBJECTIVE, DEV_EVAL, TEST_EVAL (required); optional MATERIAL, METRIC_DIRECTION (max|min), BRANCHING, MAX_DEPTH, BUDGET. Output: init.txt (and the .arbor/ state under run/).
limitation: Pure local state bookkeeping — it does not run the evaluators, dispatch executors, or touch the artifact. The held-out dev/test split is the coordinator's responsibility to construct.

vars.OBJECTIVE: Improve answer accuracy on the search harness
